status_legend.in_progress: This feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Deploy application to EKS
features.user_visible_behavior: App runs on the EKS cluster, reachable via ingress, with all env config applied.
verification: GIT_REPO=<url> bash scripts/01-check-tools.sh — all tools present + git remote accessible
bash scripts/02-verify-permissions.sh — AWS + k8s perms OK
GIT_REPO=<url> bash scripts/03-deploy-app.sh — repo cloned, image built/pushed, manifests applied
bash scripts/04-healthcheck.sh — pods ready, ingress responds 2xx

features.title: Rollback on failed healthcheck
features.user_visible_behavior: If healthcheck fails, cluster returns to previous known-good deployment.
verification: Confirm rollback is recorded in state
